site.title: Northwind Dental Studio
site.description: Northwind Dental Studio offers modern dental care with a calm clinical experience, transparent guidance, and treatments designed for long-term oral health.
site.author: ndEX

hero.pitch: Northwind Dental Studio offers preventive, cosmetic, and restorative dental care with calm visits, clear plans, and patient-first comfort every visit.

homeSections.title: FAQ
homeSections.description: Answers to common questions before your visit.

faqs.question: Do you accept new patients?
faqs.answer: Yes. We welcome new patients and offer flexible scheduling for first visits.

faqs.question: Do you provide emergency appointments?
faqs.answer: Yes. We keep limited same-day availability for urgent dental needs.

faqs.question: Do you offer whitening treatments?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide both in-studio whitening and take-home options depending on your goals.

faqs.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faqs.answer: Bring a photo ID, your insurance information if applicable, and any recent dental records you would like our team to review.

faqs.question: Do you help patients who feel nervous about dental visits?
faqs.answer: Yes. We focus on a calm, supportive experience and explain each step clearly so new patients feel more comfortable from the start.

faqs.question: How early should I arrive for a scheduled visit?
faqs.answer: We recommend arriving 10 to 15 minutes early so you can check in comfortably and complete any needed forms.

faqs.question: Can I request a follow-up appointment before leaving the office?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our front desk can help you schedule your next cleaning, review, or treatment visit before you leave.

faqs.question: Do you create treatment plans for cosmetic and restorative care?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build personalized treatment plans that explain timing, options, and priorities before any major work begins.

faqs.question: Do you offer preventive care as well as cosmetic services?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide routine preventive care alongside whitening, restorative treatments, and personalized recommendations for long-term oral health.
